chunks.text: In the world today, there are still children who cannot receive even elementary education.
In sub - Saharan Africa and South Asia, absence and dropout are serious problems.
Poverty, conflict, geographical isolation, and gender inequality.
Families unable to pay the fee
villages where children must walk for hours to reach a school
customs that deny girls the right to attend.
Yet many studies have shown that education is the most effective tool for breaking the cycle of poverty.
An educated woman tends to raise healthier children and to earn a higher income.
The United Nations has set the goal, " quality education for all by 2030.
" Through scholarship, the spread of digital learning, and the training of teachers
each country pursues its own path toward achievement.
With the spread of tablets and the internet
even remote areas are gaining access to educational content.
Technology can be a great force in closing the gap in education.
Education has the power to change not only the life of a single person but the whole of society.
That is why investment in education is the most efficient investment in the future.
